cd .
GOROOT='' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,decoratemappings=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,x509sha256skid=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=0Ls2dqPt3GhZkTRbWVUQ/RP0XZjKUrDYw4AvXacHw/w2GwpO9F0UMHZ6WZD0Aj/0Ls2dqPt3GhZkTRbWVUQ -w -X github.com/docker/compose/v2/internal.Version=v2.39.3 -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p ./bin/build/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out ./bin/build/docker-compose
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
